configurePresets.name: __release-pgo-base
configurePresets.displayName: V0.1 release-optimization base (hidden helper for PGO/ThinLTO/BOLT)
configurePresets.description: Shared hidden base for the F6.3 release-optimization presets (PGO + ThinLTO + BOLT). Forces Release buildType, disables experimental / telemetry / profiling / benchmarks / diagnostics. **EXPLICITLY DISABLES `-ffast-math`** per user spec verbatim 'NON abilitare -ffast-math globalmente finché non provato che preserva determinismo + alpha + colori + golden + cross-CPU parity'. The training corpus is the real Chronon corpus (B00-B11 documented in `examples/bench_corpus/corpus_v1.json` + per-scene YAML corpus configs), NOT a microbenchmark. Forward-point: ADR for the 5-condition determinism proof.

configurePresets.name: release-pgo
configurePresets.description: PGO profile-use build. Requires a pre-collected `merged.profdata` at the path printed by `cmake --preset release-pgo` (default `${binaryDir}/merged.profdata`; override via `-DCHRONON3D_PROFILE_DATA_PATH=...`). Profile is collected by running the instrumented build against the B00-B11 corpus (see `docs/PERFORMANCE_BOTTLENECKS.md` §F6.3 for the 3-step collection recipe). NO `-ffast-math`. Speedup expected: 5-15% on hot loops (Clang/PGO typical).

configurePresets.name: release-thinlto
configurePresets.description: ThinLTO without PGO. Link-time optimization in scalable multi-threaded mode via `-flto=thin`. No profile collection required. NO `-ffast-math`. Speedup expected: 3-8% on cross-TU inlining (Clang/ThinLTO typical).

configurePresets.name: release-pgo-thinlto
configurePresets.description: PGO profile-use + ThinLTO combined. Maximum multiplicative optimization: profile-guided branch-prediction weights + cross-TU inlining. Requires a pre-collected `merged.profdata` (default `${binaryDir}/merged.profdata`). NO `-ffast-math`. Speedup expected: 8-20% (PGO × ThinLTO typical).

configurePresets.name: release-pgo-thinlto-bolt
configurePresets.displayName: Linux Release PGO + ThinLTO + BOLT (max optimization)
configurePresets.description: PGO + ThinLTO + BOLT. Maximum optimization: profile-guided branch prediction + cross-TU inlining + BOLT post-link binary re-layout. Requires BOTH a PGO `merged.profdata` (for PGO/ThinLTO compilation) AND a BOLT `perf.fdata` (for BOLT post-processing; collected via `perf record` on the PGO-optimized binary). NO `-ffast-math`. Speedup expected: 12-25% (PGO × ThinLTO × BOLT typical). See `cmake/bolt_postprocess.cmake` for the post-link BOLT wiring; invoke via `cmake --build --target bolt-postprocess` after the main build.
